name: Project Blue Sky
description: Comprehensive platform modernization initiative delivering next-generation infrastructure, expanded feature set, and enterprise-grade capabilities throughout 2024.

milestones.name: Core Infrastructure
milestones.description: Foundation deployment including cloud infrastructure, data pipelines, and core APIs.

milestones.name: Feature Development
milestones.description: Primary feature set rollout including user portal, reporting dashboards, and integrations.

milestones.name: Performance Optimization
milestones.description: Performance tuning, database optimization, and caching layer implementation. At risk due to resource constraints.

milestones.name: Security Hardening
milestones.description: Comprehensive security audit, compliance certification, and penetration testing.

milestones.name: Final Release Prep
milestones.description: Production readiness validation, documentation finalization, and deployment preparation.

workItems.title: User Authentication System
workItems.description: OAuth 2.0 and SAML integration with multi-factor authentication support

workItems.title: Database Schema Migration
workItems.description: Migrate legacy monolithic database to microservices-compatible schema

workItems.title: API Gateway Implementation
workItems.description: Kong API gateway deployment with rate limiting and authentication middleware

workItems.title: Reporting Module
workItems.description: Executive dashboard with real-time metrics and historical trend analysis

workItems.title: Client SDK Libraries
workItems.description: Python, JavaScript, and .NET client libraries for API consumption

workItems.title: Real-time Notifications
workItems.description: WebSocket-based notification system with message queuing and delivery guarantees

workItems.title: Advanced Search Capabilities
workItems.description: Elasticsearch integration for full-text search across all data entities

workItems.title: Multi-tenancy Support
workItems.description: Data isolation and customer-specific configuration management

workItems.title: Analytics Pipeline
workItems.description: Event streaming, aggregation, and analytics using Apache Kafka and ClickHouse

workItems.title: Performance Benchmarking
workItems.description: Comprehensive load testing and optimization of critical API endpoints

workItems.title: Security Vulnerability Scanning
workItems.description: Automated security scanning with remediation tracking and compliance reporting

workItems.title: Disaster Recovery Plan
workItems.description: Document RTO/RPO targets and implement automated failover procedures
